step_by_step_thinking:
I agree with the consensus that Fresh Frozen Plasma (FFP) is the best fluid for factor VIII replacement. While recombinant human coagulation factor VIII (rFVIII) can provide fast results specifically targeted towards Factor VIII, FFP offers several additional benefits such as being readily available, containing all coagulation factors, and having fewer logistical challenges related to storage and administration. These attributes make FFP more versatile and convenient for managing chronic conditions effectively.
